overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through Night City's neon-lit urban plaza at night. The character approaches an automated food vendor, turns, and proceeds through a narrow alleyway with vibrant holographic advertisements and reflective wet concrete surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with holographic advertisements and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza toward a vending machine area

entered.detail: tall digital billboard displaying a face with red and white colors, visible between buildings
automated food vendor with glowing screens advertising 'It's BIG' sandwiches
bright cyan illuminated signage on building facade
tropical palm trees in concrete planters with orange accent lighting
linear orange neon strips illuminating seating areas

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a wide-open cyberpunk plaza at night, surrounded by towering buildings with holographic advertisements. The wet concrete reflects cyan and orange neon lights from surrounding structures. A large vertical billboard dominates the center view while palm trees line the right side of the path.

events.description: approaches the Insta Food vending machine and slows down
turns around and walks away from the vending machine, heading back toward the plaza

agents.ego_description: approaches the vending machine, observes an NPC using it, then turns and walks away

notable_agents.action: standing at the Insta Food vending machine, interacting with the touchscreen to purchase food

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the glowing Insta Food vending machine where an NPC stands purchasing food. After a brief pause, the player turns around and walks back toward the open plaza. The large holographic billboard shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera reverses direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza transition area with stairs leading to covered walkway

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs toward covered alley entrance

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza toward a stairway, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking past the player in the opposite direction

entered.detail: storefront with orange signage and green neon 'OPEN' light
wide staircase leading upward to a covered passage between buildings
horizontal illuminated banners displaying various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player walks across the plaza toward a concrete stairway, passing a pizza restaurant with glowing signage. Other pedestrians walk by in the opposite direction. The large holographic billboard remains visible ahead as the player approaches the stairs leading to a covered alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alleyway with overhead digital displays

events.description: enters the covered alley where lighting shifts to predominantly red neon strips

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow enclosed alleyway, observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the alleyway, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: narrow passage between tall buildings with overhead covering
continuous horizontal red neon lighting running along the left wall
overhead metal beams and pipes with the large billboard visible through the gap above

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow covered alleyway, leaving the open plaza behind. The environment becomes enclosed with red neon strips illuminating the left wall and digital screens displaying advertisements. The large holographic billboard remains visible overhead through the gap between building structures as the player proceeds deeper into the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban plaza that gradually narrows into a confined, glowing alleyway. It begins by moving across a wide-open concrete square where cyan and orange lights reflect off wet surfaces beneath towering holographic billboards and palm trees. As the camera approaches a glowing Insta Food vending machine and a waiting NPC, it pauses briefly before reversing direction, shifting the dominant billboard to the left of the frame. The scene then opens back up as the player passes a glowing pizza restaurant and oncoming pedestrians, moving toward a set of concrete stairs. Finally, the environment tightens as the camera enters a covered corridor, leaving the open plaza behind for a space enclosed by red neon strips and digital screens while the distant holographic billboard remains visible overhead.
